sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46510" key="zw|otrofiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῳοτροφ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n46510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">connected with the feeding of animals</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg008.perseus-grc1:263e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">263e</biblScope> </bibl>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>),= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῳοτροφία</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg008.perseus-grc1:267b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">267b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
